name: GPT-OSS 120B
memo: OpenAI first open-source MoE model. 117B total params, 5.1B active per forward pass. Optimized for single H100 with MXFP4 quantization.

name: GPT-OSS 20B
memo: OpenAI compact open-source MoE model. 21B total params, 3.6B active per forward pass. Optimized for consumer/single-GPU hardware.

name: GPT-OSS Safeguard 20B
memo: Safety reasoning model built on gpt-oss-20b. Specialized for content classification, LLM filtering, and trust & safety labeling.

memo: Google open-weight multimodal model with 128K context.

memo: Google mid-size open model for on-prem deployment.

memo: Google smallest open model for mobile and embedded use.
